claims.interpretation: The CONFIRM engine output indicates a significant effect with a beta coefficient of -1654.2086480065677, a 95% confidence interval ranging from -1774.5348756657286 to -1533.8824203474069, and a standard error of 61.292188687238095. The p-value is extremely low at 2.1762293771854846e-112, indicating strong statistical significance. The standardized effect size is -1.7156409590131518, suggesting a large effect. Diagnostics of the model show a residual mean of approximately zero (5.905513123370389e-07), and a residual standard deviation of 803.7019171857888. The homoscedasticity test p-value is 0.06590876133368172, and the normality test p-value is 0.15544753500136974, both of which do not reject the null hypotheses of homoscedasticity and normality of residuals, respectively. The heterogeneity I² is 94.99538783162565, indicating high heterogeneity. All gates were passed, including checks for confounding, multiplicity, multiverse, power, replication, and search provenance. Numeric statements not present in the computed result bundle were removed.
